ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "duration_min" REAL /* Duration of the song in minutes */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the song is explicit or not */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the song */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Company that produced the song */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is a featured track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the song */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the album */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is a single */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genre structure) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the genre is a primary genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "audio_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the audio feature belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the key detection */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the mode detection */,
  "tempo_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the tempo detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  "is_music_analyst" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has music analyst privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public */,
  "number_of_songs" INTEGER /* Number of songs in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist song */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the song belongs to */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, song play) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time the activity was performed */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the activity was performed (e.g., IP address, device type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation is for */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended song */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, user, editor) */,
  "is_listened" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recommended song was listened to by the user */,
  "listened_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommended song was listened to */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating for the recommended song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist genre */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_artists" (
  "song_artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song artist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_artists_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_artists_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "artwork_url" TEXT /* URL to the album artwork */,
  "number_of_tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks on the album */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a compilation */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label that released the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
